column1: # Provenance: SY17–SY23 annual aggregate transcription from Ofgem annual-report PDFs.
# Per-row source PDF URL is recorded in the source_pdf_url column; full per-PDF
# sha256 + retrieved_on chain lives in the sibling .meta.json sources[] array (D-03).
# Source PDFs (one per scheme year — GB rows mandatory
#         (D-11 mutualisation event — record mutualisation_gbp_total in roc-prices.csv)
#   scheme_year       : ^SY\d{2}$  (label of the scheme year — SY17 = April 2017–March 2018)
#   year              : int64      (calendar year of the SY end)
#   technology        : string from Ofgem's published table
#   source_pdf_url    : string (one of the URLs listed above)
